summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new Site Settings features for Shivdhara Charitable Trust admin panel. All 66 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified: Logo & Images tab with 7 upload areas (Main Logo, Logo Dark, Hero Image 1, Hero Image 2, About Page Image, CTA Image, Donate Image), Social Links tab with 6 fields (Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, YouTube, LinkedIn, WhatsApp), social icons appearing in footer when links are configured, and Gallery image upload with local file storage.
passed_tests: Admin Login - Successfully logged in with admin@admin.com / admin@123
Site Settings - 10 tabs present: Page Visibility, Contact Info, Bank Details, Trust Details, UPI, Logo & Images, Social Links, Email (SMTP), Razorpay, Impact Stats
Logo & Images Tab - Main Logo upload area with 'Used in header and footer' description
Logo & Images Tab - Logo (Dark Background) upload area with 'Optional - for dark sections' description
Logo & Images Tab - Hero Image 1 upload area with 'Main homepage banner' description
Logo & Images Tab - Hero Image 2 upload area with 'Secondary banner image' description
Logo & Images Tab - About Page Image upload area with 'Featured on about page' description
Logo & Images Tab - CTA Section Image upload area with 'Call to action background' description
Logo & Images Tab - Donate Page Image upload area with 'Featured on donate page' description
Social Links Tab - Facebook field with placeholder 'https://facebook.com/yourpage'
Social Links Tab - Instagram field with placeholder 'https://instagram.com/yourpage'
Social Links Tab - Twitter / X field with placeholder 'https://twitter.com/yourpage'
Social Links Tab - YouTube field with placeholder 'https://youtube.com/yourchannel'
Social Links Tab - LinkedIn field with placeholder 'https://linkedin.com/company/yourcompany'
Social Links Tab - WhatsApp field with placeholder '+919876543210'
Social Links Save - Successfully saved all 6 social links with 'Settings saved!' toast
Footer Social Icons - Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, YouTube, LinkedIn icons appear when links are configured
Footer WhatsApp - WhatsApp link appears with correct wa.me URL format
Homepage Dynamic Images - Uses getLogo() and getHeroImage() from SiteSettingsContext
Gallery Section - Shows existing albums with Add Album button
Gallery Form - New Album form with Title (EN/GU), Category dropdown, Active checkbox
Gallery Image Upload - File upload area with 'Click to upload images' text, supports JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP (multiple allowed)
File Upload API - POST /api/upload successfully uploads images and returns URL
File Upload API - POST /api/upload/multiple successfully uploads multiple images
File Upload API - Correctly rejects non-image file types (400 error)
File Upload API - Correctly requires authentication (401/403 error without token)
Site Images API - GET /api/settings returns site_images with all 7 image fields
Site Images API - PUT /api/settings successfully updates individual image URLs
Site Images API - PUT /api/settings successfully updates all images at once
Social Links API - GET /api/settings returns social_links with all 6 platform fields
Social Links API - PUT /api/settings successfully updates individual social links
Social Links API - PUT /api/settings successfully updates all social links at once
Social Links API - Empty string clears social link (hides icon in footer)
seed_data_creation: Test data created during API tests was cleaned up automatically.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new Site Settings features tested and working: 1) Logo & Images tab with 7 upload areas (Main Logo, Logo Dark, Hero Image 1, Hero Image 2, About Page Image, CTA Image, Donate Image), 2) Social Links tab with 6 fields (Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, YouTube, LinkedIn, WhatsApp), 3) Social icons in footer only appear when links are configured, 4) Images stored locally at /app/backend/uploads/, 5) SiteSettingsContext provides getLogo(), getHeroImage(), getSocialLinks(), hasSocialLink() helpers. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_site_settings_v2.py cover all new APIs.
